summary.volDesc: Market in long-gamma regime — dealers suppressing volatility. Premium selling favored.

signals.title: Dealers Long Delta — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer net delta: +20,574,069 contracts. Dealers will sell into rallies — capping upside. Best to sell CEs near resistance.

signals.title: IV Elevated — NIFTY: 28.0%
signals.desc: ATM IV at 28.0% — options richly priced. Sell premium via iron condors or spreads. Avoid naked option buying.

signals.title: Zero-Gamma Level Close — NIFTY @ ₹22,976
signals.desc: Spot within 0.1% of zero-gamma (22,976). Crossing this level could trigger accelerated moves as dealer hedging flips direction.

signals.title: Fresh Call Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: CE OI at ₹23,000 growing +73% today (175,860 OI). Strong resistance wall forming — sell CE spreads above this level.

signals.title: Dealer Flip Level @ ₹23,025 — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer delta flips at ₹23,025 (0.3% away). Crossing this triggers forced directional hedging — potential for sharp acceleration.

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: PE OI at ₹23,000 growing +34% today (167,785 OI). Strong support floor — sell PE spreads below this level.

signals.title: Short Gamma Regime — NIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = -79.8Cr. Dealers SHORT gamma: volatility amplification. Expect larger moves; avoid selling naked options.

signals.title: Long Gamma Regime — BANKNIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = +242.8Cr. Dealers LONG gamma: volatility suppression. Expect range-bound price; premium selling favored.

signals.title: IV Elevated — BANKNIFTY: 31.2%

signals.title: Max Pain Pull — BANKNIFTY: ₹54,100.0 (+3.0%)
